summary: Session 7 (final session of Set 026) delivered wizard integration, the test-notification button, adoption-doc and quick-start updates, CLAUDE.md version bump, and CHANGELOG finalization. Wizard integration: wizard.html action buttons converted from inline onclick to data-command + addEventListener (CSP fix, Blocker finding from cross-provider verification); new 'Configure AI Router' button wired to dabbler.openConfigEditor via WizardPanel.ts openConfigEditor message case; openExternal case added for pricing-link (was posted but never handled — Minor finding). Test-notification button: notificationsSection.ts button enabled (was disabled since Session 5); ConfigEditorPanel.ts _handleTestNotification() implementation (~80 LOC): reads configured Pushover env-var names from local-overrides.yaml, resolves values from process.env, spawns Python subprocess calling ai_router.notifications.send_pushover_notification() with PUSHOVER_API_KEY/PUSHOVER_USER_KEY env injection, surfaces result via showInformationMessage/showErrorMessage; spawnErrored flag added to prevent duplicate error toasts (Minor finding). Docs: quick-start.md new 'Configuring your project' section; adoption-bootstrap.md Step 9 closing pointers add 'Configuring the AI router visually' subsection; CLAUDE.md version line v0.13.14 -> v0.13.15 + Router-config editor subsection. CHANGELOG.md [0.13.15] block expanded with Session 7 Added entries. tsc clean throughout. pytest 427 passed, 1 skipped. Cross-provider verification via gpt-5-4: 1 Blocker (CSP) + 2 Minors (openExternal + duplicate toast) — all addressed and fixed. Verification cost: $0.358. Cumulative Set 026 verification spend: $3.86 of $10.00 NTE. Extension v0.13.15 + ai_router 0.3.0 ship with this set complete.
deferred_followups: Marketplace release: tag vsix-v0.13.15 + push tags to trigger tag-driven Marketplace deployment job (operator approves in GitHub Actions UI)
PyPI release: ai_router 0.3.0 via existing tag-driven flow
